gold.title: Modern Animated Sign In
gold.reason: Custom animated input with mouse-tracking radial highlight effect using useMotionValue and useMotionTemplate — premium micro-interaction design that makes every field feel tactile and alive.

gold.title: Premium Auth
gold.reason: Full auth system (login/signup/reset modes) with step-based registration, password visibility toggle, and polished icon set (Shield, KeyRound, AlertTriangle) — the most complete and premium auth component in the set.

gold.title: Auth Form
gold.reason: Motion-animated form with entrance animation, social buttons, background decoration, and dark/light theme support via next-themes — clean modern aesthetic with excellent visual layering.

gold.title: Modern & Stunning Sign In
gold.reason: Dark (#121212) glassmorphism card on a full-screen dark background with relative overflow-hidden treatment — visually striking premium aesthetic suitable for SaaS or creative agency sign-in pages.

gold.title: Gaming Login
gold.reason: Video background login with icon-enhanced inputs, remember-me toggle, and social login buttons (Chrome, Twitter, Gamepad2) — uniquely bold visual design that differentiates a gaming or entertainment brand.

silver.title: Auth Fuse
silver.reason: Polished auth component with CVA variants, Radix label primitives, and eye toggle — solid engineering with clean structure but no distinctive visual design beyond functional clarity.

silver.title: Sign In
silver.reason: Standard sign-in with inline Google SVG icon and eye/eyeoff password toggle — functional and clean but no animations or layout innovation.

silver.title: Sign In Flo
silver.reason: Animated form fields with mouse-position tracking highlight and focus state management — interesting interaction layer but the overall visual design lacks the premium layout quality of Gold tier.

silver.title: Sign In
silver.reason: White card with gradient blur header, brand logo, rounded-2xl shadow — clean modern card layout with nice depth, but relatively simple structure without animation.

silver.title: Sign In 1
silver.reason: Well-documented composable auth form with logo, primary/secondary actions, and shadcn Card — good structure and flexible API but visually conservative.

silver.title: Full Screen Signup
silver.reason: Full-screen layout with email/password validation and submission handling — solid UX approach with good layout scale but limited visual styling beyond basics.

bronze.title: Sign Up
bronze.reason: Heavily imported utility file (cn, cva, forwardRef, icons) with standard sign-up fields — over-engineered plumbing with no distinctive visual design output.

bronze.title: Clean & Minimal Sign In
bronze.reason: Basic email/password form with inline validation — purely functional with no animations, gradients, or layout differentiation.

bronze.title: Sign In
bronze.reason: Bare shadcn Card + Input + Label + Button composition — a direct shadcn block recipe with no custom visual treatment.

bronze.title: Signup 1
bronze.reason: Minimal signup with Google icon button and email input — only two interactive elements with no layout, illustration, or animation to distinguish it.
